coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 10:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 98-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 10:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. 10:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 33% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 43% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 20 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 22 minutes in. 100% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 43% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 43% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 32 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 15 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 10:00 at 100%. Then 5min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 10:00 at 100%. Then 5min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 10:00 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 10:00 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 10:00. Give it everything. 5min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 90% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 90% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 90% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
